name: oarepo-c4gh
documentation:
Crypt4GH Processing
===================

A Crypt4GH container processing library.

Copyright (c) 2024 Dominik Pantůček <dominik.pantucek@trustica.cz>

Distributed under MIT license - see LICENSE for details.

For usage instructions, see the [generated
documentation](https://oarepo.github.io/oarepo-c4gh/).

The [test coverage
report](https://oarepo.github.io/oarepo-c4gh/cov_html/) is also
available.

modules.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions
documentation:
This module defines all the exceptions the Crypt4GH library may
produce.

classes.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHException

methods.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHException.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the internal exception code. This is used by
derived exceptions to specify the machine-readable exception
code.

Parameters:
    ecode: internal machine-readable string identifying the exception
    message: a descriptive message about the problem

methods.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHException.code
documentation:
The machine-readable exception code provided as instance
exception property for convenience.

Basic Crypt4GH exception from which all exceptions must be
derived. This exception must not be used directly.

classes.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHKeyException

methods.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHKeyException.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the key exception.

Parameters:
    message: a descriptive message about the problem

An exception for any problems related to the user-provided
cryptographic keys and not the Crypt4GH containers themselves.

classes.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHHeaderException

methods.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHHeaderException.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the header exception.

Parameters:
    message: a descriptive message about the problem
An exception related to Crypt4GH header processing problem.

classes.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHHeaderPacketException

methods.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHHeaderPacketException.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the header packet exception.

Parameters:
    message: a descriptive message about the problem

An exception related to particular Crypt4GH header packet
processing problem.

classes.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHDEKException

methods.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHDEKException.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the DEK exception.

Parameters:
    message: a descriptive message about the problem

Base exception raised when something goes wrong with Data
Encryption Key(s).

classes.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHProcessedException

methods.name: oarepo_c4gh.exceptions.Crypt4GHProcessedException.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the Processed exception.

Parameters:
    message: a decriptive message about the problem

An exception for signalling the container cannot be processed
again from the beginning.
